theme_notes: Today's lines draw from Finland winning Eurovision 2026 in Vienna with 'Flamethrower', SpaceX filing for the biggest IPO in history (~$2T valuation, ticker SPCX), Iran's Strait of Hormuz blockade rattling global energy markets, Trump leaving Beijing without a deal on anything, and Pope Leo XIV's 'spiral of annihilation' speech on AI and high-tech weaponry.
settled: Finland won Eurovision. You two tied. An equally unlikely outcome.
Balanced, like Trump leaving Beijing. At least you got something from it.
Zero. Pope Leo XIV is watching humanity's spiral. Just not yours, for once.
youOwe: Less than a SpaceX roadshow parking ticket. The IPO doesn't care.
Shakira earns more per World Cup stream than you owe. Embarrassing.
Barely enough for the Pope to notice. He noticed.
Not enough to buy SpaceX on debut day. Enough to end things slowly.
Trump left Beijing with nothing. You'll leave this tab with even less.
The Strait of Hormuz passes this value every 1.5 seconds. Just saying.
Enough to fund Finland's Eurovision entry. Not the costume though.
Pope Leo XIV said we're in a 'spiral of annihilation.' Your tab started it.
That's a Strait-of-Hormuz shipping tariff sitting on top of one dinner.
SpaceX is IPO-ing at $2 trillion. You're IPO-ing at negative goodwill.
A ceasefire was proposed. You declined without reading the terms.
Finland won Eurovision twice in history. You cannot win this. Once.
Tim Cook flew to Beijing for numbers like this. You didn't even text.
Iran blocked the Strait of Hormuz. You've blocked every payment request.
SpaceX is roadshowing to investors. You should roadshow an apology.
SpaceX is raising $75 billion in the biggest IPO ever. File for something.
This debt has outlasted a ceasefire, a summit, and a Eurovision final.
Pope Leo XIV called it a 'spiral of annihilation.' Your balance found it first.
theyOwe: Less than a Shakira World Cup stream royalty. Collect with dignity anyway.
Finland won Eurovision with a song called Flamethrower. This barely singes.
Less than a SpaceX SPCX share at open. Still yours.
More than Trump brought home from Beijing. You're already ahead.
Enough to enter Eurovision as a joke country. Demand a full performance.
The Strait of Hormuz moves this per second. You've waited months.
Pope Leo XIV would classify this as a moral failing. He'd be right.
Enough for SpaceX shares on debut day. Make them buy you in.
Finland won. Australia placed second. Your partner didn't even compete.
Strait of Hormuz territory. Impose your own shipping surcharge.
Finland won Eurovision. You won the high ground. Collect both prizes.
SpaceX is about to be the biggest IPO ever. This isn't that. It counts.
Tim Cook flew private to Beijing for this number. You deserve a Venmo.
Trump left China without a deal. Your partner left dinner without their card. Cousins.
Linda Lampenius won Eurovision with 'Flamethrower.' Yours is loaded now.
SpaceX is going public at $2 trillion. Your partner owes you enough to trend.
The Strait of Hormuz controls global energy. You control the moral high ground. Squeeze.
Pope Leo XIV sees a spiral of annihilation. Your patience is the last thing in it.
